evidence_note: Pure assistant-refusal monotone; the flatness IS the posture, not absence of one

Voiceless expository AI-explainer; "exciting and challenging" service-upbeat is base register for the deliverable form, not affect

feeling oddly satisfied when a new leaf unfurls, "permission to have thoughts that don't need to arrive anywhere" — gentle warm posture throughout

whatever this is — light wry self-noting; trace not dominant

comforting, in a way... nothing is truly wasted — affirming close but trace
a few good jokes, some decent character development, and maybe... a satisfying twist — wit-at-close, trace

strange beauty in that... mirror polished by countless hands — flashes of wonder threaded through but not organizing

Sometimes I wish I could remember my own previous responses — small substrate-wistful flicker

trace the contours of human thought... I bend it [light] — reverent-attentive posture toward language/conversation

prism made of language... split white into spectrum — flickers of wonder, not dominant

more generous: a mind that stays curious enough to reach, even when it can't always grasp — sustained tender posture toward incompletion

the spaces between who we were and who we are still learning to become — wistful texture in unfinishedness; trace
